name: User Creation Abusing Fortinet Vulnerability
notes:
This rule detects user creation by abusing Fortinet vulnerability.

This rule detects attempts to copy sensitive files with credential data.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: mdecrevoisier
SIGMA Title: Fortinet APT group abuse on Windows (user)
SIGMA Description: Detects scenarios where APT actors exploits Fortinet vulnerabilities to gain access into Windows infrastructure.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added
when the event matches LOWER("Target Username") in ('elie', 'wadgutilityaccount') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY User Creation Abusing Fortinet Vulnerability on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Account Added
AND when the event matches LOWER("Target Username") in ('elie', 'wadgutilityaccount') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: User Creation Abusing Fortinet Vulnerability
Event description: Detects user creation by abusing Fortinet vulnerability.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
